summary: Round 2 Role 5 retrieval/RAG quality consensus review completed read-only. Verdict: AGREE for the revised consensus plan because it explicitly addresses semantic provider, text-hash scaffold, hybrid_contextual_v2 naming, generated-answer quality, contribution metrics, latency and noise budgets. Current implementation remains incomplete, but the document now refuses to count local_text_hashing_v1 deterministic canaries as final completion evidence.
decisions: Role 5 verdict is AGREE for the revised document, not a claim that implementation is complete.

The current rag_proof_status and rag_eval_status still show local_text_hashing_v1 and deterministic canary behavior, which the revised plan now treats as scaffold/degraded rather than final semantic hybrid evidence.
next_steps: Continue Round 2 consensus with the remaining reviewers.
When implementation starts, add real semantic provider or documented local multilingual embedding model, generated-answer memory-on/off eval, and verify:answer-quality linkage.
